data.name: customSqlQuery1.Sql
data.value:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, '' as sysdate_tdate,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.used_amount , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) AS member_name_2 , 0 AS color , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock , sc_lon_m_coll_rule.percent_shareperloan_drop , 0 AS coll_current ,sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_cnt_m_coop.manager_name, ('!member_name_1!') AS number_book , sc_cnt_m_coop.coop_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.address , sc_cnt_m_coop.tumbol_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_province.province_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_district.district_name , sc_cnt_m_coop.telephone_no , sc_cnt_m_coop.postcode , sc_cnt_m_coop.fax_no
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_cnt_m_coop, sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_lon_m_coll_rule, sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_ucf_province , sc_mem_m_ucf_district
WHERE 1 = 2 /*WHERE*/

data.name: c_address_1.Expression
data.value: Iif( IsNull([ADDRESS]), '' , Trim([ADDRESS]) ) + 'ต. ' + Iif( IsNull([TUMBOL_NAME]), '' , Trim([TUMBOL_NAME]) ) + ' อ.'+Iif( IsNull([DISTRICT_NAME]), '' ,Trim([DISTRICT_NAME]) ) +' จ.'+ Iif( IsNull([PROVINCE_NAME]), '' ,Trim([PROVINCE_NAME]) )
